_example: Fill with {"file": "<path>", "reason": "<why>"}. Put spec/research files only — no code paths. Run `python3 .trellis/scripts/get_context.py --mode packages` to list available specs. Delete this line once real entries are added.

author: doro
content: BATCH-18c json_store helper 完成。新增 flutter_app/lib/core/persistence/json_store.dart (~165 行：3 个 public fn + resolvePersistenceDir + _Mutex)。providers.dart 17 个 IO wrapper 保留签名，body 全部 1-3 行 helper 调用；dbDirProvider 也改用 resolvePersistenceDir，providers.dart 中 Platform.isAndroid / getApplicationDocumentsDirectory / getApplicationSupportDirectory / 'settings.json' 字面量 0 命中（doc-comment 提及不算）；dart:io + path_provider 顶层 import 已删除。新增 test/json_store_test.dart 9 个 case（round-trip / file missing / key missing / parse 异常 / delete keep siblings / delete no-op / 并发 write 串行 / read+write 不死锁 / 静默错误）。F-W2A-003 在 findings-flutter-core.md + findings.md 索引同步标 Resolution。flutter analyze PASS，无新 warning。
